word: G361 - ἀναμάρτητος - anamártētos - an-am-ar'-tay-tos - That is without sin

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναμάρτητος

- Transliteration: Anamartetos

- Phonetic: an-am-ar'-tay-tos

- Definition:

1. sinless

a. of one who has not sinned

b. of one who cannot sin

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G264

- TDNT entry: 06:33,5

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G264; sinless: - that is without sin.
